An honorific head mark which heralds the beginning of text or commencement of a new folio.

A Tibetan mark that closes the head marks with which it ligates.
A Tibetan mark that closes the head marks with which it ligates. The name for this sign in the Tibetan script is ཡིག་མགོ་སྒབ་མ (yig mgo sgab ma).

The terma break ༔ (:); a punctuation mark or textual delimiter used in a fashion somewhat comparable to a comma.
